'''鈭歡-m-ch''' ('''gamacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naturalise|naturalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naturalise|naturalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| gamacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamachithi|gamachithi]] || [[word:gamachiji|gamachiji]] || [[word:gamachishi|gamachishi]] || [[word:gamachi|gamachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamachuthuth|gamachuthuth]] || [[word:gamachujuj|gamachujuj]] || [[word:gamachushush|gamachushush]] || [[word:gamach|gamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamachuthu|gamachuthu]] || [[word:gamachuju|gamachuju]] || [[word:gamachushu|gamachushu]] || [[word:gamachu|gamachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamachufuth|gamachufuth]] || [[word:gamachufuj|gamachufuj]] || [[word:gamachufush|gamachufush]] || [[word:gamachuf|gamachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamachethe|gamachethe]] || [[word:gamacheje|gamacheje]] || [[word:gamacheshe|gamacheshe]] || [[word:gamache|gamache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamachothoth|gamachothoth]] || [[word:gamachojoj|gamachojoj]] || [[word:gamachoshosh|gamachoshosh]] || [[word:gamach|gamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamachotho|gamachotho]] || [[word:gamachojo|gamachojo]] || [[word:gamachosho|gamachosho]] || [[word:gamacho|gamacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamachofoth|gamachofoth]] || [[word:gamachofoj|gamachofoj]] || [[word:gamachofosh|gamachofosh]] || [[word:gamachof|gamachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamach忙th忙|gamach忙th忙]] || [[word:gamach忙j忙|gamach忙j忙]] || [[word:gamach忙sh忙|gamach忙sh忙]] || [[word:gamach忙|gamach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamachathath|gamachathath]] || [[word:gamachajaj|gamachajaj]] || [[word:gamachashash|gamachashash]] || [[word:gamach|gamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamachatha|gamachatha]] || [[word:gamachaja|gamachaja]] || [[word:gamachasha|gamachasha]] || [[word:gamacha|gamacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamachafath|gamachafath]] || [[word:gamachafaj|gamachafaj]] || [[word:gamachafash|gamachafash]] || [[word:gamachaf|gamachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gamachasha|gamachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogamachasha|gogamachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigamachasha|gokigamachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gamachn眉sha|gamachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogamachnkn眉sha|gogamachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigamachn眉sha|gokigamachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gamachsh毛sha|gamachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogamachnksh毛sha|gogamachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigamachsh毛sha|gokigamachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamachrosha|gamachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamachnkrosha|gogamachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamachrosha|gokigamachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gamachmusha|gamachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamachnkmusha|gogamachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamachmusha|gokigamachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gamachsherasha|gamachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogamachnksherasha|gogamachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigamachsherasha|gokigamachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gamachngasha|gamachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogamachnkngasha|gogamachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigamachngasha|gokigamachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gamachyasha|gamachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogamachnkyasha|gogamachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigamachyasha|gokigamachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gamachyamasha|gamachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogamachnkyamasha|gogamachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigamachyamasha|gokigamachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamachn眉sh毛sha|gamachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamachnkn眉sh毛sha|gogamachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamachn眉sh毛sha|gokigamachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamachn眉rosha|gamachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamachnkn眉rosha|gogamachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamachn眉rosha|gokigamachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamachn眉musha|gamachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamachnkn眉musha|gogamachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamachn眉musha|gokigamachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamachsh毛n眉sha|gamachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamachnksh毛n眉sha|gogamachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamachsh毛n眉sha|gokigamachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamachsh毛rosha|gamachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamachnksh毛rosha|gogamachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamachsh毛rosha|gokigamachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamachsh毛musha|gamachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamachnksh毛musha|gogamachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamachsh毛musha|gokigamachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamachron眉sha|gamachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamachnkron眉sha|gogamachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamachron眉sha|gokigamachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamachrosh毛sha|gamachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamachnkrosh毛sha|gogamachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamachrosh毛sha|gokigamachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamachromusha|gamachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamachnkromusha|gogamachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamachromusha|gokigamachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamachmun眉sha|gamachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamachnkmun眉sha|gogamachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamachmun眉sha|gokigamachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamachmush毛sha|gamachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamachnkmush毛sha|gogamachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamachmush毛sha|gokigamachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamachmurosha|gamachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamachnkmurosha|gogamachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamachmurosha|gokigamachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gamach|gamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:g忙m忙ch|g忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogamach|hogamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hog忙m忙ch|hog忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogamach|hohogamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohog忙m忙ch|hohog忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉gamach|n眉gamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉g忙m忙ch|n眉g忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉gamach|n眉n眉gamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉g忙m忙ch|n眉n眉g忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂gamach|n茂gamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂g忙m忙ch|n茂g忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂gamach|n茂n茂gamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂g忙m忙ch|n茂n茂g忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugamach|lugamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lug忙m忙ch|lug忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugamach|lulugamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulug忙m忙ch|lulug忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligamach|ligamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lig忙m忙ch|lig忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligamach|liligamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilig忙m忙ch|lilig忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogamach|kogamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kog忙m忙ch|kog忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogamach|kokogamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokog忙m忙ch|kokog忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegamach|kegamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keg忙m忙ch|keg忙m忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegamach|kekegamach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeg忙m忙ch|kekeg忙m忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
